# Scale X

> Scale X is a BYOK SaaS that diagnoses the single business bottleneck costing a $10k–100k/month info business the most revenue, then deploys a Claude-powered AI agent — using the founder's own Stripe data and their own Anthropic API key — to fix it, instead of just showing a dashboard.

## About

- Audience: US-based infopreneurs and course/coaching businesses doing $10k–100k/month in revenue.
- How it works: connects to the user's own Stripe account (Stripe Connect) to compute revenue-loss diagnostics in code, then runs an AI agent (bring-your-own Anthropic API key) that acts on the diagnosis.
- Not a dashboard: the product's output is a fix carried out by an agent, not a chart the user has to interpret themselves.
